74573.subject: The Daily Degen - June 15th, 2026
74573.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-15th-2026

Happy Monday friends! All sorts of stuff going on!
Let’s dive in!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.376T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $742.84
Gold: $4,319.90
Silver: $69.88
Oil (WTI): $80.53
US 10Y Treasury: 4.469%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 26
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
While prices might be in goblintown, there are still untold defi teams getting after it and shipping hard and continuing to build the financial rails the global economy will one day run on!
A prime example are the dedicated gents at @rocksolidHQ [ https://substack.com/redirect/37a1d2dd-766f-4138-87f1-a49f24c39e9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
RockSolid is an extremely cool project built by co-founders Ben Ward @wardy_ben [ https://substack.com/redirect/533917d7-b7e3-423d-b89e-f2a51562dc62?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and Steve Pack @paladin_eth [ https://substack.com/redirect/b59ed299-bbc5-46bd-9b4b-dfbb2769890b?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]… designed to bring the best yield-maxxing opportunities possible to the world of defi!
They now have two such vaults: a) the Rocksolid $rETH Vault [ https://substack.com/redirect/51028703-cb68-4b9b-b189-1817e48afddb?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and b) the RockSolid AutoPlus Looped $ETH Vault [ https://substack.com/redirect/0b530f67-4fb6-4405-980e-371728422781?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
If you want a great breakdown of everything RockSolid is doing, check out the interview RockSolid co-founder Steve Pack did with Sam Kamani for the Rocket Fuel podcast embedded below!
Also make sure to follow RockSolid on Twitter/X [ https://substack.com/redirect/37a1d2dd-766f-4138-87f1-a49f24c39e9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates as well, and stay tuned as we continue shining a light on everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mostly green today. Top 25 chains up at least 20% on the monthly include Arbitrum (#3), Provenance (#10), Ink (#13), Near (#21), ENI (#22), and Stellar (#24). 
Protocols are mostly green today as well. Top 25 protocols up at least 20% on the monthly include Aave (#1), Sablier (#4), Figure Markets (#23), and Sentora (#25).

74515.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 14
74515.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-14-oleh-bezuhlyi-akqxf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BmbZ4FC4IQ0mg0XDN2T%2BrWg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3vrdyj7E8K3ck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqe0o02q~q3-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqe0o02q-q3
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: A July 1 MiCA cutoff looms for millions of EU crypto users while a DPRK-linked $36M hack and a UK naval seizure exposing USDT sanctions evasion show that crypto's geopolitical risk is no longer theoretical. 🚨 Millions of EU Crypto Users Face Exchange Cutoff as MiCA Deadline Hits in Days On July 1, 2026, the temporary operating permission that allowed crypto companies to serve EU customers while awaiting a full MiCA license expires — and exchanges, brokers, and wallet services that have not secured authorization must immediately cut off access to European users with no further grace period. CryptoSlate reports that the deadline creates a live operational crisis for ordinary investors who may lose access to their funds, positions, or platforms overnight, with little notice from providers scrambling to reach compliance. Read full story 💀 Humanity Protocol's $36M Hack Linked to Suspected North Korean Hackers Cybersecurity firm Quantstamp has attributed the $36 million breach of Humanity Protocol to suspected North Korean threat actors, identifying a fraudulent phishing email spoofing crypto exchange Bithumb as the attack's primary entry vector. The incident adds another eight-figure sum to the growing ledger of assets stolen by DPRK-affiliated hacking groups, which have systematically targeted blockchain projects to fund state programs operating under international sanctions. More details ⚖️ CFTC No-Action Letter Opens First Legal Path for Digital Commodity Perpetuals in the US The CFTC issued a staff no-action letter that clears a legal runway for perpetual futures contracts on digital commodities to operate within the United States — a product category that has until now existed almost exclusively at offshore venues to sidestep regulatory uncertainty. The guidance provides immediate operational clarity for US-domiciled exchanges and their institutional clients, who have long been unable to offer the perpetual swap structures that dominate global crypto derivatives volumes. Read more 📊 SEC Proposes Reg NMS Rule Changes That Could Reshape Tokenized Stock Trading The SEC has proposed rescinding Rules 611 and 610e of Regulation NMS — the order-protection and access rules that have governed US equity market structure for two decades — in a move with substantial downstream implications for how tokenized st

74375.subject: 🇺🇦 Ваш грошовий переказ не було доставлено
74375.body:
PS Ваш переказ не був
доставлений і Paysend здійснив повернення коштів        Вітаємо,
Oleh,

Повідомляємо, що ваш нещодавній переказ не був доставлений.
Платіж було повернено на ваш початковий спосіб оплати. Обробка
повернення коштів банком може зайняти до трьох днів. Деталі
транзакції:

* Номер транзакції: 21429828200

* Сума: 100
EUR

Можливі причини проблем з переказом:

* Неправильні дані одержувача: Переконайтеся, що дані одержувача
правильні
* Потрібна додаткова інформація: Нам може знадобитися більше
інформації від вас для обробки переказу
* Перевищено ліміти: Перевірте, що ви не перевищили ліміти
переказу, встановлені Paysend або банком одержувача
* Тимчасові проблеми: Можливі тимчасові проблеми з банком або
мережею одержувача
* Відмова банком одержувача: Банк одержувача міг відхилити кошти
з власних причин
Рекомендовані дії:

* Перевірте дані вашого одержувача
* Зверніть увагу на повідомлення від Paysend з проханням надати
додаткову інформацію
* Переконайтеся, що ви не перевищили ліміти переказу Paysend
* Перевірте, що у вас стабільне інтернет-з’єднання
* Ознайомтесь з будь-якими повідомленнями про помилки в
інтерфейсі Paysend і дійте згідно з наданими інструкціями
Будь ласка, виконайте наведені вище рекомендовані дії і
повторіть ваш переказ.

74347.subject: cenová ponuka
74347.body:
Dobrý deň Vám prajem, 

na základe nášho stretnutia Vám posielam spracovanú cenovú ponuku.

Cenová ponuka je orientačná a nezáväzná, čokoľvek sa môže zmeniť, upraviť, pridať, ubrať. Výsledná suma vždy závisí od konkrétnych predstáv a požiadavok klienta, od druhu a množstva použitých živých a všetkých ostatných materiálov. 

Štandardne pracujeme tak, že takto dopredu pred svadbou pripravujem ponuku, ktorá je orientačná. Ťažko dopredu určiť presnú sumu a takisto ani Vy nemusíte ešte teraz presne vedieť koľko príde nakoniec hostí, ako sa bude sedieť, koľko stolov budete potrebovať, ako sa môžu zmeniť Vaše predstavy. :-)
Zhruba dva týždne pred svadbou, ako som už spomínala, prípadne podľa potreby skôr sa pripraví predbežná kalkulácia, ktorá sa vyrátava už na základe reálnych počtov položiek a požiadavok a v neposlednom rade počtu hostí.
Všetko je to v prvom rade o komunikácii. Snažím sa jednať s ľuďmi fér, seriózne a k práci pristupovať zodpovedne.
Myslím, že sa dá na mňa v čomkoľvek obrátiť a spoľahnúť. 

Kľudne si ponuku preštudujte a ak by ste mali akékoľvek otázky, chceli sa na čokoľvek opýtať, ak by ste chceli niečo zmeniť, pridať, ubrať, prípadne nastaviť si výšku budgetu kľudne sa na mňa obráťte, rada Vám odpoviem, pomôžem, poradím. 
Všetko som pripravila tak, aby to bolo čo najjednoduchšie pochopiteľné. Ak by bolo čokoľvek nejasné, pýtajte sa.

Ak som na niečo zabudla kľudne ma doplňte. 😉

Budem čakať za Vašou spätnou väzbou.

Prajem krásny deň.



S pozdravom / Best regards

Bc. Lucia Ortutová
Event manager/wedding coordinator

+421 907 382 402
www.dekoracnyservis.sk
info@dekoracnyservis.sk

74315.subject: Minebea, Výplatná páska/Payslip 05/2026
74315.body: Milí kolegovia, v prílohe tejto správy sa nachádza Vaša výplatná páska. Na otvorenie výplatnej pásky použite posledné 4 číslice vášho rodného čísla (za lomkou). Ak ste si heslo zmenili, použite nové heslo. _________________________________________________ Dear all, attached to this e-mail is your payslip. To open your payslip, use the last 4 digits of your birth number (after the slash). If you have changed your password, please use the new one. S pozdravom / Best regards, Personnel & Payroll department Minebea Slovakia s.r.o K letisku 1637, 040 17 Kosice
